sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 263441, "Meeks Creek", Stream, El Dorado Co., CA
Cal. Code Regs. Tit. 14, § 7.50(b)(152) — Alphabetical List of Trout Waters with Special Fishing Regulations (Tahoe Lake and tributaries)
sources.quotedText: (152) Tahoe Lake and tributaries (Placer and El Dorado Cos.). (A) Tahoe Lake tributaries upstream to the first lake. Sat. preceding Memorial Day through Sep. 30. Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used. 0 trout (B) Tahoe Lake within 300 feet of the mouth of its tributaries. Sat. preceding Memorial Day through Sep. 30. Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used. 0 trout

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(a)(1) — General Provisions (waters listed in subsection (b) closed except during the open season shown; gear restrictions apply to all species)
sources.quotedText: Every body of water listed in subsection (b) is closed to all fishing except during the open season as shown. Unless otherwise provided, waters shown as open to trout fishing in subsection (b), are open to fishing for other species. Gear restrictions listed in this section apply to the take of all species of fish unless otherwise noted.

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.40 — Alphabetical List of Hatchery Trout, Hatchery Steelhead, and Salmon Waters with Special Fishing Regulations (Meeks Creek not listed by name)
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: Meeks Bay, California — Wikipedia (Meeks Creek enters Lake Tahoe at Meeks Bay, El Dorado Co.)
sources.quotedText: Meeks Bay (formerly, Meigs Bay, Micks Bay, and Murphys) is an unincorporated community in El Dorado County, California. It lies on Lake Tahoe at the mouth of Meeks Creek, at an elevation of 6,240 feet (1,902 m).

sources.title: 2026 Provisional Stocking Document for Trout and Inland Salmon — CDFW (Meeks Creek not listed)

groups.humanSummary: Meeks Creek is a west-shore Lake Tahoe tributary — it drains the Tallant Lakes chain of the Desolation Wilderness and enters Lake Tahoe at Meeks Bay (El Dorado Co.). It is not listed under its own name, but as a Tahoe Lake tributary it is governed by the special Tahoe-tributary regulation §7.50(b)(152)(A): catch-and-release open season Sat. before Memorial Day–Sep. 30, artificial lures with barbless hooks only, 0 trout; closed the remainder of the year per §7.50(a)(1). The 'upstream to the first lake' limit reaches from Meeks Bay up to Lake Genevieve, the lowest of the Tallant Lakes.
groups.verbatimText: (152) Tahoe Lake and tributaries (Placer and El Dorado Cos.). (A) Tahoe Lake tributaries upstream to the first lake. Sat. preceding Memorial Day through Sep. 30. Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used. 0 trout

parameters.note: Meeks Creek is a tributary of Lake Tahoe (it drains the Tallant Lakes of the Desolation Wilderness and enters the lake at Meeks Bay, El Dorado Co.). It is not listed by its own name in §7.40(b) or §7.50(b), but it falls under the Lake Tahoe tributaries entry §7.50(b)(152)(A), which applies to 'Tahoe Lake tributaries upstream to the first lake' — here, from Meeks Bay upstream to Lake Genevieve. Per §7.50(a)(1), waters listed in subsection (b) are closed to all fishing except during the shown open season — so the creek is closed Oct. 1 through the Friday preceding the Saturday before Memorial Day. Date_spec encodes 'Saturday preceding Memorial Day' as the last Monday of May (Memorial Day) minus 2 days, since the resolver has no anchor_holiday implementation.

regulations.humanSummary: Open catch-and-release only, Saturday before Memorial Day through Sept. 30; closed to all fishing the rest of the year (Lake Tahoe tributary special regulation).
regulations.verbatimText: (A) Tahoe Lake tributaries upstream to the first lake. Sat. preceding Memorial Day through Sep. 30. Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used. 0 trout

regulations.humanSummary: 0 trout (catch-and-release) during the open catch-and-release window.

parameters.note: Gear restriction applies to the take of all species per §7.50(a)(1).

regulations.humanSummary: Artificial lures with barbless hooks only during the open window; no bait (gear restriction applies to all species per §7.50(a)(1)).
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license. Meeks Creek is wholly within California (El Dorado Co.); the Lake Tahoe CA/NV reciprocal-license arrangement applies to the lake itself, not to this tributary.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+.
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
